tasks.subject: Add inject_tail_frame helper + extract_last_frame ABC default + FakeEngine impl + tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New pure helper + ABC default + Fake override land together with full TDD coverage. After this task, the building blocks exist; Task 2 wires them into the stage.

**Files:**
- Create: src/kinoforge/core/continuity.py
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py (add extract_last_frame after the 5 existing abstract methods)
- Modify: src/kinoforge/engines/fake/__init__.py (override extract_last_frame)
- Create: tests/core/test_continuity.py
- Modify: tests/core/test_interfaces.py (add ABC default-raises test)
- Modify: tests/engines/test_fake.py (add extract_last_frame test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- core/continuity.py exposes inject_tail_frame
- GenerationEngine.extract_last_frame default raises NotImplementedError with class name
- FakeEngine.extract_last_frame returns ConditioningAsset(kind=image, role=init_image, ref.filename derived deterministically)
- 6 new tests pass
- pre-commit clean
- coverage >= 90%

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/core/test_continuity.py tests/core/test_interfaces.py tests/engines/test_fake.py -v

**Spec:** docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-29-continuity-fallback-design.md §5.1, §5.2, §5.3, §6.1, §6.2, §6.3
**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-29-continuity-fallback.md Task 1

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/continuity.py", "src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/fake/__init__.py", "tests/core/test_continuity.py", "tests/core/test_interfaces.py", "tests/engines/test_fake.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_continuity.py tests/core/test_interfaces.py tests/engines/test_fake.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["continuity helper exposed", "ABC default raises with class name", "FakeEngine override returns deterministic asset", "6 new tests pass", "pre-commit clean", "coverage >= 90%"], "specPath": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-29-continuity-fallback-design.md", "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-29-continuity-fallback.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Wire continuity into GenerateClipStage non-native branch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Stage replaces pool.map(jobs) with a mode-aware sequential loop that calls inject_tail_frame between adjacent jobs when the mode's role contract contains init_image. Orchestrator + tests updated for the new engine field.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py (add engine field, replace pool.map, update imports)
- Modify: src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py (line 477: add engine=resolved_engine kwarg)
- Modify: tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py (update 3 construction sites; add 4 new behaviour tests)
- Modify: tests/core/test_pool.py (line 153 stage_kwargs dict: add engine=)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- engine field added to GenerateClipStage
- MODE_ROLE_REQUIREMENTS used for chain dispatch
- orchestrator.py:477 passes engine=resolved_engine
- all existing construction sites updated
- 4 new behavioural tests pass
- grep for continuity DEFERRED comment returns 0
- pre-commit clean
- coverage >= 90%
- Closes #1 in commit message

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py tests/core/test_pool.py -v && grep -n 'DEFERRED.*continuity\|DEFER stitching/continuity' src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py

**Spec:** docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-29-continuity-fallback-design.md §5.4, §5.5, §6.4, §6.5
**Plan:** docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-29-continuity-fallback.md Task 2

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py", "src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py", "tests/core/test_pool.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/pipeline/test_generate_clip.py tests/core/test_pool.py -v && grep -n 'DEFERRED.*continuity\\|DEFER stitching/continuity' src/kinoforge/pipeline/generate_clip.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["engine field added", "MODE_ROLE_REQUIREMENTS dispatch", "4 new stage tests pass", "grep DEFERRED continuity = 0", "Closes #1 trailer", "pre-commit clean", "coverage >= 90%"], "specPath": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-29-continuity-fallback-design.md", "planPath": "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-29-continuity-fallback.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Update PROGRESS.md: mark Layer B complete; point next action at Layer C
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Per project CLAUDE.md durability rules — keep the recovery index current. Single next action now points at Layer C (S3/GCS stores, GitHub issue #5; unblocked by Layer A's uri_for).
